creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon May 26 15:34:27 2014
New Revision: 355389
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355389
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355389/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/190251
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/databases/p5-Metadata/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/p5-Metadata/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/p5-Metadata/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:23 2014	(r355388)
+++ head/databases/p5-Metadata/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:27 2014	(r355389)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	databases perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl implementation of Dublin Core compatible metadata
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-TimeDate>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-TimeDate
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
